label: Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference

node.label: Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference
node.definition: Parallel inference partitions tensors, layers, sequence positions, requests, or experts across multiple devices and coordinates the required communication.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference is modeled as depending on Model servers & inference runtimes, Distributed systems & networking and feeding downstream nodes such as Large language models.

limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Model servers & inference runtimes, Distributed systems & networking.
